packets.name: Bootstrap & Schema
packets.notes: 38/38 tests pass. Validated 2026-03-10. Schema matches spec exactly (all 6 tables, all columns, all FKs verified). Column tests added for all tables during validation.

packets.name: Git Quick Scan
packets.notes: 23/23 tests pass. 61/61 full suite passes. Validated 2026-03-10. All 8 acceptance criteria verified. Porcelain parsing covers MM/AM/D/UU. Empty repo handling confirmed. No scope creep.

packets.name: Repo Discovery & Registration API
packets.notes: 17/17 tests pass. 78/78 full suite passes. Validated 2026-03-10. All 11 acceptance criteria verified. discover_repos, detect_runtime, generate_repo_id, get_default_branch, register_repo, get_db dependency, GET/POST /api/repos, DELETE /api/repos/{id}, --scan CLI flag. CASCADE delete tested. Submodule dedup tested. No scope creep.

packets.name: Fleet API & Quick Scan Orchestration
packets.notes: Validated 2026-03-10. 8/8 packet tests pass, 86/86 full suite passes. All 10 acceptance criteria verified. scan_fleet_quick with asyncio.Semaphore(8), working_state upsert, GET /api/fleet with full response shape. No scope creep, no regressions.

packets.name: HTML Shell & Design System
packets.notes: Validated 2026-03-10. 10/10 packet tests pass, 96/96 full suite passes. All 13 acceptance criteria verified. Full CSS design system (46 vars matching §5.2), CDN tags pinned (React 18.2.0, ReactDOM 18.2.0, Babel 7.23.9, Recharts 2.12.7), React shell with ErrorBoundary, hash routing, NavTabs with sliding underline, Header with buttons, ContentArea placeholders. No scope creep, no regressions.

packets.name: Fleet Overview UI
packets.notes: Validated 2026-03-10. 14/14 packet tests pass, 110/110 full suite passes. All 17 acceptance criteria verified. FleetOverview with KpiRow (6 cards, conditional coloring), GridControls (custom SortDropdown + FilterInput), ProjectCard (3-row with RuntimeBadge, StatusPills, DepBadge, SparklineOverlay), EmptyState. Freshness at 7/30/90 days. Filter-then-sort client-side. Null safety confirmed for timeAgo, freshness, dep_summary, empty sparkline. No scope creep, no regressions.

packets.name: Git Full History Scan
packets.notes: Validated 2026-03-10. 15/15 packet tests pass, 125/125 full suite passes. Critical fix: format string used literal \x00 (crashes subprocess) → changed to %x00 (git format escape). Regression guard added. All 15 acceptance criteria verified. parse_git_log, aggregate_daily_stats, scan_full_history, upsert_daily_stats, run_full_history_scan all correct. No scope creep.

packets.name: Branch Scan
packets.notes: Validated 2026-03-10. 13/13 packet tests pass, 138/138 full suite passes. All 13 acceptance criteria verified. STALE_THRESHOLD_DAYS=30, _is_stale, parse_branches, scan_branches, upsert_branches, run_branch_scan. DELETE+INSERT upsert in single transaction. %x00 git format escape (not literal \x00). Boundary test uses 30d-1s margin. CASCADE test with PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON. No scope creep, no regressions.

packets.name: Full Scan Orchestration & SSE
packets.notes: Validated 2026-03-10. 16/16 packet tests pass, 154/154 full suite passes. All 16 acceptance criteria verified. Tests strengthened during validation: added DB guard 409 test (server-restart scenario), empty fleet test (0 repos → completed), and finished_at assertion on failure path. POST /api/fleet/scan with Literal type validation, dual 409 guard (_active_scan_id + DB), asyncio.create_task background launch. SSE endpoint via StreamingResponse + asyncio.Queue bridge. run_fleet_scan sequential loop with continue-on-error. type='deps' no-op. Fleet endpoint branch_count/stale_branch_count from branches table. No scope creep, no regressions.

packets.name: Sparklines & Scan Progress UI
packets.notes: Validated 2026-03-10. 10/10 packet tests pass, 164/164 full suite passes. All 14 acceptance criteria verified. compute_sparklines() bulk-queries daily_stats for 91-day window, returns dict of 13-int arrays. Fleet endpoint sets sparkline=[0]*13 default. Frontend: ScanProgressBar (3px, green on completion), ScanToast (slide-in/out, 2s auto-dismiss), handleFullScan() with EventSource lifecycle, refetchKey triggers FleetOverview re-fetch. Button disabled while scanning. No scope creep, no regressions.

packets.name: Project Detail View & Activity Chart
packets.notes: Validated 2026-03-10. 13/13 packet tests pass, 178/178 full suite passes. All 18 acceptance criteria verified. Removed unused datetime import from get_repo_detail. Strengthened test_global_table_styles to check all 4 CSS classes. GET /api/repos/{id} + GET /api/repos/{id}/history?days=N. Frontend: ProjectDetail, DetailHeader, SubTabNav, TimeRangeSelector (30/90/180/365/All), ActivityTab with date-gap filling, ActivityChart (AreaChart stackOffset=sign, 3 series: insertions/deletions/net via Area fill=none), PlaceholderTab for Commits/Branches/Dependencies. Global table CSS. No scope creep, no regressions.

packets.name: Commits & Branches Sub-tabs
packets.notes: Validated 2026-03-10. 15/15 packet tests pass, 193/193 full suite passes. All 21 acceptance criteria verified. GET /api/repos/{id}/commits (live git log, --skip/--max-count pagination, parse_git_log reuse, subject→message mapping). GET /api/repos/{id}/branches (DB read, ORDER BY is_default DESC, last_commit_date DESC). CommitsTab (25/page, Prev/Next pagination, date/message/+−/files columns). BranchesTab (default=blue badge, stale=orange badge with computed days, active=muted text). parseRoute extended to extract optional sub-tab segment. ProjectDetail accepts initialSubTab prop, key={repoId} forces remount on repo change, handleSubTabChange updates window.location.hash. CSS vars --accent-blue-dim and --status-orange-bg already existed. No scope creep, no regressions.

packets.name: Dependency Detection & Parsing
packets.notes: Validated 2026-03-10. 42/42 packet tests pass (35 specified + 4 parametrize + 3 validation additions). 235/235 full suite passes. All 19 acceptance criteria verified. Strengthened weak Poetry test (concrete version assertions). Added missing-include, tomllib-unavailable tests (pyproject + Cargo). detect_dep_files, parse_requirements_txt (with -r include + circular guard), parse_pyproject_toml (PEP 621 + Poetry), parse_package_json, parse_go_mod, parse_cargo_toml, parse_gemfile, parse_composer_json, parse_deps_for_repo. No scope creep, no regressions.

packets.name: Python Dep Health
packets.notes: Validated 2026-03-10. 26/26 packet tests pass, 261/261 full suite passes. All 16 acceptance criteria verified. Strengthened weak non-pip assertion (explicit per-field absence). Added vuln-overrides-major test (AC 11 coverage). classify_severity, check_python_outdated (PyPI JSON API, urllib stdlib, skip range/unpinned, fail-open), check_python_vulns (pip-audit subprocess, requirements.txt only, fail-open, vuln overrides outdated/major), check_python_deps orchestrator (pip/non-pip split, all 9 required fields stamped). No DB writes. No scope creep, no regressions.

packets.name: Node Dep Health
packets.notes: Validated 2026-03-10. 22/22 packet tests pass, 283/283 full suite passes. Strengthened vacuous assertion in test 1 (or True → explicit field-absence checks). check_node_outdated (npm outdated --json, exit-code-1-safe, classify_severity reuse), check_node_vulns (npm audit --json, exit-code-1-safe, advisory_id=npm:<name>, vuln overrides), check_node_deps orchestrator (npm/non-npm split, all 9 required fields stamped). No DB writes. No scope creep.

packets.name: Go / Rust / Ruby / PHP Dep Health
packets.notes: Packet doc written 2026-03-10. 4 ecosystems (Go, Rust, Ruby, PHP), 12 functions (4 orchestrators + 4 outdated + 4 vuln), 40 tests specified. May split into 15A-15D if ecosystems prove complex during implementation.

packets.name: Dep Scan Orchestration
packets.notes: Packet doc written 2026-03-10. Wires health checkers into scan loop, adds DB persistence (dependencies table writes), populates dep_summary and KPIs on fleet endpoint. 16 tests specified.
